series_metadata.series_description: Position descriptions and other documents relating to each position.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until applicable period has been audited by Auditor of state, audit report is released, and all discrepancies are resolved; then destroy. ; Paper: Scan to electronic medium for storage, check scan for accuracy, then destroy. Retain existing offsite files for 75 years, unless needed for longer period of time based upon legal or administrative significance or scanned to electronic medium for storage., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Recycle
